Snow Storm Mask  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 7
STR: +4
SV COLD: +9
Effect: Heat Sight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Snow Storm Mask
Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 7
STR: +4
SV COLD: +9
Effect: Heat Sight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Snow Hunter's Mask
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Tribute:938
Lucy Entry By:Atarak
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 08:32:51
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 3,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Velketor the Sorcerer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth


Uploaded November 7th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Help, my eyes are tingling!
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 1:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361790970
10 posts
Could just be tears of joy, though. Finally got one of these for my little blind Human Monk. Perfect item. More Ac than Sarnak Hide mask he was wearing before. No Weight. J-O-Y!
Hehe, if I weren't sucj a faction wuss, i'd have just Gone Ikky though, and it wouldn't be an issue. Oh well:)
▲ Page top
Humans, and other blind folk
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 4:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751003709
View User Forum
120 posts
This mask would be great for any human or erudin, except the ones with sight altering spells. :) 7 ac is pretty good for a mask, shur there 35 ac masks that drop, but if you tol me more than 20 people had one of them i would question your sainity. Heat sight is infravision, so for blind erudins and paladins this mask is slmost a must, unless you can get a better vision item, or can summon coldstones. :)
▲ Page top
crap mask?
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 1:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250314542
3 posts
All you people that say its a crap mask are fools, and yes it probably is only good for a monk. Just because an item is not good for your class doesnt mean its crap. I am a 55 monk and this item would be great for me, 7ac is alot on a monk mask.

55 Monk
52 Druid
34 Paladin
29 Mage
▲ Page top
Two words...
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 2:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764554486
22 posts
Peridot... Fund...

I swear to you items like this were put in the game so that the guilds who kill them have something they can sell. Which has no use for them, and will fetch a few bucks to buy regents for spells which are consumed by the hundreds on raids...
▲ Page top
Trash or Treasure
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 12:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757638677
38 posts
One man's trash is another man's treasure....ALWAYS keep that in mind. This is by far a good piece of armor, seriously, look at mask AC in general and this is at least in the top 50% for AC, little STR, a resist, and then Heatvision....not bad at all.

Also, in agreement with the "monk only" crap I keep seeing. If all low wieght items are monk only then I better start selling my baked food to monks. I also have some tinkered Stalking Probes (5 charges eye of Zoom ALL ALL weigth 0.1) that obviously are for monks.

Low weight does not mean monk only, it just makes it more desirable for monks.

Also, and just a question here, Are the people that complain about high weight on items that are usable by monks the same ones complaining that low weight items are monk only?

▲ Page top
RE: Trash or Treasure
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 4:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
About the Stalking Probles: If that's the Eye of Zomm thing, I suspect you may actually have a market, from the high-level monks that haven't yet camped for the Holgresh spirit beads that do the same thing. :-) Baked goods are a little harder to sell (unless they have good stats) since most Monks I know these days can make a passable Fish Roll.
▲ Page top
RE: Trash or Treasure
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 3:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
For sure. Top 50% for ac. Off a mob that is in the top 5% for difficulty. Risk Vs. reward.... nice twinking item, though. I'll give it that. I'd stick that on my level 11 warrior any day.
▲ Page top
Risk vs Reward (again)
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 8:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
Once again, it comes down to a matter of risk vs reward. As a cleric, I wear a mask of war. MUCH easier to get than this and it gives 9 wis in addition to the same AC.

Defeating Velketor is no walk in the park. It took my guild several times before we learned to defeat him regularly. Most of his loot isn't worth the difficulty to be honest.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 28 2001 at 7:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What a piece of crap. Total junk. If his really drops of Velkator himself it's retarded. An Enshrouded Viel is a common drop in HS and is infinately better. Hell it's only moderately better than a Sarnak-hide mask. If you can kill Velketor you can kill Lord Dolemite, and he has better monk items with sight effects.
Who would want?
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 6:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756795321
View User Forum
Scholar
177 posts
I am a 47 monk and would love to have this. A definite upgrade from my Split Paw mask. YEA YEA YEA 47 with split paw armor! I am what you might call a ghetto monk. Anyway, I would not be totally upset is any night blind class wanted to roll on this but like many others have said once you are high enough to hunt in Velks, most folks would pass on it. This gives ghetto monks like me hope hehe. Or maybe I will just save the trouble and buy one. NAAA I need better weapons P....and hence I stay ghetto.

Quanko Crakkers
47th Monk Spirits of Valor
The only Jewish, Ghetto monk in Norrath

__DEL__1593361497292

Sorry, your not the only jewish ghetto monk in Norath. First, maybe. Deffinatly not the only one. And as for this mask iff all you people dont want it I will double the merchants offer on Veeshan. Just send me a tell my names are listed and like most I am on alot.

Warriors agree.... Monk item!
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2001 at 5:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750631095
2 posts
I will say this... the guy that posted the pic (and got the item after we killed Velketor)... IS a monk! He's also one of, I think... 2 people at the raid that had any interest in it. War,Clr,Pal,Bard,Rog,Shaman,Sk,Ran all get better masks as common drops from Western Wastes... which leaves this mask for Druids and Monks.

RE: Awsome monk item
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2001 at 9:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765333097
8 posts
just so you know, human monks are not the only night blind race/class. ALL humans, erudites, and barbarians are night blind. oh, and dont tell me it should be monk only cause 0.0 weight. if u think it should be monk only u have obviously never been to velious cause like everything drops there is like 0.1 weight or below almost, and anyways, EVERY piece of monk's armor could weight 0.5 and they would still be under their weight allowance, so will all the monks plz quit screaming "omfg this is a MONK item look it says we can equip and it weighs like nothing MONK!!!!!!!!!!!!" oh btw this item sucks for a velk drop that dude is extremely hard, the only reason a monk would be awarded this is cause none of the other melees would want it probably cause lets face it this item has fairly weak ac/str by the time u can get it

Very good mask

# Aug 27 2001 at 4:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764514625

7AC, 4 STR, Cold resist, 0 weight, PLUS infravision. Very nice mask for anyone who gets it. If anyone makes a comment about monks should get this, I shall keeeel them.

# Aug 28 2001 at 12:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757748741

Attention K-Mart shoppers: THIS ITEM SUX0RZ!!!! If this item dropped in say.... guk.. it would be a good item. But it doesn't.. you have to kill Velketor the Sorceror to get this. The only halfway decent thing about this is that it's droppable so you can twink with it.

God, play a character to high enough level where you're invited to go kill Velk and then tell me how good this item is.

Heat Sight
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2001 at 4:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249548720
Scholar
89 posts
Good for dark nights as a barb when you have no shaman around.

Infravision


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Wiz (L16)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Divination
Allowable Targets: Self

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 30
Spell Duration: 270 ticks (27.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 3
Casting Time: 5.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.25 seconds
Recast Delay: 7.50 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your eyes tingle.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso's eyes glow red.
Spell fades: Your infravision fades.
